name: Incident Reports
description: Collection of reports related to incidents.

dataset.name: Incident Types
dataset.query: SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family order by description

dataset.name: Incident Status
dataset.query: SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_status where code NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT') order by description

dataset.name: Prisoner Role
dataset.query: SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_prisoner_role order by description

dataset.name: Region Codes
dataset.query: select area_code as code, description from prisons.nomis_areas where area_class = 'REGION' and active_flag = 'Y' and area_code NOT IN ('CT', 'HS', 'KSE', 'MID', 'WM', 'YP') order by description

dataset.name: Prisons
dataset.query:
select agy_loc_id prison_id, description prison_name FROM prisons.nomis_agency_locations al 
where al.agency_location_type = 'INST'
and al.active_flag = 'Y' AND al.agy_loc_id NOT IN ('TRN', 'OUT')
order by description

dataset.name: Incident report summary
dataset.query:
SELECT id,
       report_reference,
       ctf.code                    as type,
       ctf.description             as type_description,
       status,
       cs.description              as status_description,
       incident_date_and_time,
       reported_at,
       reported_by,
       title,
       r.description,
       location,
       al.description              as location_name,
       al.noms_region_code         as region_code,
       area.description            as region_name,
       modified_at,
       -- Cast the LISTAGG result to a specific length to prevent the 65k error
       (SELECT CAST(LISTAGG(prisoner_number || ' (' || cr.description || ')', ', ') 
               WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY prisoner_number ASC) AS VARCHAR(4000))
        FROM prisons.incidentreporting_prisoner_involvement pi 
        JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_prisoner_role cr ON pi.prisoner_role = cr.code
        WHERE pi.report_id = r.id) as prisoners_involved
FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report r
       JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_status cs ON r.status = cs.code
       JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type ct ON r.type = ct.code
       JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family ctf ON ctf.code = ct.family_code
       JOIN prisons.nomis_AGENCY_LOCATIONS al ON al.agy_loc_id = r.location
       LEFT JOIN prisons.nomis_areas area ON area.area_class = 'REGION' AND area.area_code = al.noms_region_code    
WHERE status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')

dataset.name: Count of incidents per location per day
dataset.query:
SELECT 
    CAST(date_trunc('day', incident_date_and_time) AS DATE) AS start_date, 
    -- Use TO_CHAR for Redshift dialect
    to_char(min(incident_date_and_time), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS filter_date, 
    location, 
    al.description              as location_name,
    al.noms_region_code         as region_code,
    area.description            as region_name,
    ctf.code AS type, 
    ctf.description AS type_description, 
    count(*) AS num_of_incidents
FROM 
    prisons.incidentreporting_report r 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_status cs ON r.status = cs.code 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type ct ON r.type = ct.code 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family ctf ON ctf.code = ct.family_code
JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_AGENCY_LOCATIONS al on al.agy_loc_id = r.location
LEFT JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_areas area on area.area_class = 'REGION' and area.area_code = al.noms_region_code        
WHERE 
    status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')
GROUP BY 
    1, 
    location, 
    al.description,
    al.noms_region_code,
    area.description,
    ctf.code, 
    ctf.description

dataset.name: Count of incidents per location per week
dataset.query:
SELECT 
    CAST(date_trunc('week', incident_date_and_time) AS DATE) AS start_date, 
    -- Use TO_CHAR for Redshift execution
    to_char(min(incident_date_and_time), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date, 
    to_char(max(incident_date_and_time), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date, 
    location, 
    al.description              as location_name,
    al.noms_region_code         as region_code,
    area.description            as region_name,
    ctf.code AS type, 
    ctf.description AS type_description, 
    count(*) AS num_of_incidents
FROM 
    prisons.incidentreporting_report r 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_status cs ON r.status = cs.code 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type ct ON r.type = ct.code 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family ctf ON ctf.code = ct.family_code 
JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_AGENCY_LOCATIONS al on al.agy_loc_id = r.location
LEFT JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_areas area on area.area_class = 'REGION' and area.area_code = al.noms_region_code         
WHERE 
    status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')
GROUP BY 
    1, 
    location, 
    al.description,
    al.noms_region_code,
    area.description,
    ctf.code, 
    ctf.description

dataset.name: Count of incidents per location per month
dataset.query:
SELECT 
    CAST(date_trunc('month', incident_date_and_time) AS DATE) AS start_date, 
    -- Use TO_CHAR for Redshift/Federated execution
    to_char(min(incident_date_and_time), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date, 
    to_char(max(incident_date_and_time), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date, 
    location, 
    al.description              as location_name,
    al.noms_region_code         as region_code,
    area.description            as region_name,
    ctf.code AS type, 
    ctf.description AS type_description, 
    count(*) AS num_of_incidents
FROM 
    prisons.incidentreporting_report r 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_status cs ON r.status = cs.code 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type ct ON r.type = ct.code 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family ctf ON ctf.code = ct.family_code 
JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_AGENCY_LOCATIONS al on al.agy_loc_id = r.location
LEFT JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_areas area on area.area_class = 'REGION' and area.area_code = al.noms_region_code      
WHERE 
    status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')
GROUP BY 
    1, 
    location, 
    al.description,
    al.noms_region_code,
    area.description,
    ctf.code, 
    ctf.description

dataset.name: Count of prisoner incidents by type per month
dataset.query:
SELECT 
    CAST(date_trunc('month', incident_date_and_time) AS DATE) AS month_year,
    to_char(min(incident_date_and_time), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date,
    to_char(max(incident_date_and_time), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date,
    pi.prisoner_number,
    initcap(pi.first_name) AS first_name,
    initcap(pi.last_name) AS last_name,
    ctf.code AS type,
    ctf.description AS type_description,
    r.location,
        al.description as location_name,
       al.noms_region_code         as region_code,
       area.description            as region_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS num_of_incidents
FROM 
    prisons.incidentreporting_prisoner_involvement pi
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_report r ON r.id = pi.report_id
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type ct ON r.type = ct.code 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family ctf ON ctf.code = ct.family_code
JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_AGENCY_LOCATIONS al on al.agy_loc_id = r.location
LEFT JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_areas area on area.area_class = 'REGION' and area.area_code = al.noms_region_code
WHERE 
    status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')
GROUP BY 
    1, 
    location, 
    pi.prisoner_number,
    pi.last_name, 
    pi.first_name, al.description,
    al.noms_region_code,
    area.description,
    ctf.code, 
    ctf.description

dataset.name: Report of prisoner involvement in an incident
dataset.query:
SELECT 
    r.id, 
    r.report_reference, 
    r.location,
    al.description              as location_name,
    al.noms_region_code         as region_code,
    area.description            as region_name,
    ctf.code AS type, 
    ct.description AS type_description, 
    r.status, 
    cs.description AS status_description, 
    r.incident_date_and_time, 
    r.reported_by, 
        initcap(pi.first_name) AS first_name,
    initcap(pi.last_name) AS last_name,
    pi.prisoner_number, 
    pi.comment
FROM 
    prisons.incidentreporting_prisoner_involvement pi 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_report r ON r.id = pi.report_id
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_status cs ON r.status = cs.code 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type ct ON r.type = ct.code 
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family ctf ON ctf.code = ct.family_code 
JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_AGENCY_LOCATIONS al on al.agy_loc_id = r.location
    
LEFT JOIN prisons.nomis_areas area on area.area_class = 'REGION' and area.area_code = al.noms_region_code    
WHERE 
    status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')

dataset.name: Prisoner summary of incidents
dataset.query:
select pi.prisoner_number,
      initcap(pi.first_name) AS first_name,
    initcap(pi.last_name) AS last_name,
       ob.agy_loc_id                                               as location,
       el.description                                              as prison_name,
       el.noms_region_code                                         as region_code,
       area.description                                            as region_name,
       al.description                                              as cell_location,
       sum(case when ctf.code = 'ASSAULT' then 1 else 0 end)       as assault_count,
       sum(case when ctf.code = 'SELF_HARM' then 1 else 0 end)     as self_harm_count,
       sum(case when ctf.code = 'FIND' then 1 else 0 end)          as finds_count,
       sum(case when ctf.code = 'DISORDER' then 1 else 0 end)      as disorder_count,
       sum(case when ctf.code = 'DRUGS' then 1 else 0 end)         as drugs_count,
       sum(case when ctf.code = 'MISCELLANEOUS' then 1 else 0 end) as misc_count,
       count(*)                                                    as total_incidents
from prisons.nomis_OFFENDER_BOOKINGS ob
         JOIN prisons.nomis_OFFENDERS o
              ON o.OFFENDER_ID = ob.OFFENDER_ID AND ob.BOOKING_SEQ = 1 AND ob.ACTIVE_FLAG = 'Y'
         join prisons.incidentreporting_prisoner_involvement pi on pi.prisoner_number = o.OFFENDER_ID_DISPLAY
         join prisons.nomis_AGENCY_INTERNAL_LOCATIONS al on ob.LIVING_UNIT_ID = al.INTERNAL_LOCATION_ID
         join prisons.nomis_agency_locations el on el.agy_loc_id = ob.agy_loc_id
         join prisons.incidentreporting_report r on r.id = pi.report_id
         join prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type ct on r.type = ct.code
         join prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family ctf on ctf.code = ct.family_code
         JOIN prisons.nomis_areas area on area.area_class = 'REGION' and area.area_code = el.noms_region_code         
WHERE r.status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')
GROUP BY pi.prisoner_number, pi.last_name, pi.first_name, ob.agy_loc_id, el.description, el.noms_region_code, area.description, al.description

dataset.name: INC0020 Serious and Sexual Assault Incident Detail
dataset.query:
SELECT DISTINCT 
    r.id AS report_id,
    r.report_reference,
    r.incident_date_and_time,
    r.title,
    r.description,
    r.status,
    cs.description AS status_description,
    r.location,
    al.description as location_name,
    al.noms_region_code         as region_code,
    area.description            as region_name,
    pi.id AS prisoner_involvement_id,
    pi.prisoner_number,
    pi.prisoner_role,
    pr.description AS prisoner_role_description,
    initcap(pi.first_name) AS first_name,
    initcap(pi.last_name) AS last_name
FROM 
    prisons.incidentreporting_report r
JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_AGENCY_LOCATIONS al on al.agy_loc_id = r.location
LEFT JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_areas area on area.area_class = 'REGION' and area.area_code = al.noms_region_code
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_status cs ON r.status = cs.code
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_prisoner_involvement pi ON r.id = pi.report_id
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_constant_prisoner_role pr ON pi.prisoner_role = pr.code
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_question at_incident_question ON r.id = at_incident_question.report_id
JOIN 
    prisons.incidentreporting_response at_incident_answer ON at_incident_question.id = at_incident_answer.question_id
WHERE 
     r.status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')
    AND (
        (r.type = 'ASSAULT_5' AND (
            (at_incident_question.question IN ('WAS A SERIOUS INJURY SUSTAINED',
                                                'WAS THIS A SEXUAL ASSAULT',
                                                'WAS MEDICAL TREATMENT FOR CONCUSSION OR INTERNAL INJURIES REQUIRED')
             AND at_incident_answer.response IN ('YES'))
            OR (
                (at_incident_question.question IN ('IS THE ASSAILANT KNOWN TO HAVE AN INFECTIOUS DISEASE THAT CAN BE TRANSMITTED IN SALIVA')
                 AND at_incident_answer.response IN ('YES'))
                AND (at_incident_question.question IN ('DID THE SALIVA HIT THE BODY OR CLOTHING OF THE VICTIM(S)')
                     AND at_incident_answer.response IN ('YES'))
            )
            OR (at_incident_question.question IN ('TYPE OF HOSPITAL ADMISSION')
                AND at_incident_answer.response IN ('INPATIENT (OVERNIGHT ONLY)', 'INPATIENT (OVER 24HR)', 'LIFE SUPPORT'))
            OR (at_incident_question.question IN ('WHERE DID IT HIT')
                AND at_incident_answer.response IN ('NECK OR ABOVE'))
            OR (at_incident_question.question IN ('DESCRIBE THE WEAPONS USED')
                AND at_incident_answer.response IN ('EXCRETA/URINE'))
        ))
        OR (r.type = 'ASSAULT_1' AND (
            (at_incident_question.question IN ('WAS A SERIOUS INJURY SUSTAINED',
                                                'WAS THIS A SEXUAL ASSAULT',
                                                'DID INJURIES RESULT IN DETENTION IN OUTSIDE HOSPITAL AS AN IN-PATIENT',
                                                'WAS MEDICAL TREATMENT FOR CONCUSSION OR INTERNAL INJURIES REQUIRED')
             AND at_incident_answer.response IN ('YES'))
            OR (at_incident_question.question IN ('WHICH SERIOUS INJURIES WERE SUSTAINED')
                AND at_incident_answer.response IN ('BITES', 'BLACK EYE', 'BROKEN NOSE', 'BROKEN TEETH', 'CRUSHING', 
                                                    'EXTENSIVE/MULTIPLE BRUISING', 'EXTENSIVE OR MULTIPLE BRUISING', 
                                                    'FRACTURE', 'SCALD OR BURN', 'STABBING', 'TEMPORARY/PERMANENT BLINDNESS'))
        ))
    )

dataset.name: Deliberate Self Harm Report
dataset.query:
WITH pivoted_responses AS (
    SELECT 
        q.report_id,
        MAX(CASE 
            WHEN q.question = 'WHERE DID THE INCIDENT TAKE PLACE' AND res.sequence = 0 
            THEN res.response 
        END) AS q1_location,
        
        MAX(CASE 
            WHEN q.question = 'WHERE DID THE INCIDENT TAKE PLACE' AND res.sequence = 0 
            THEN res.additional_information 
        END) AS additional_comment,
        
        -- Standardized all LISTAGG to use (ORDER BY res.sequence)
        -- Added CAST to VARCHAR(4000) for Spectrum safety
        CAST(LISTAGG(
            CASE
                WHEN q.question = 'DID SELF HARM METHOD INVOLVE CUTTING' AND res.response = 'YES' THEN 'Cutting'
                WHEN q.question = 'DID SELF HARM METHOD INVOLVE HANGING' AND res.response = 'YES' THEN 'Hanging'
                WHEN q.question = 'DID SELF HARM METHOD INVOLVE SELF STRANGULATION' AND res.response = 'YES' THEN 'Self Strangulation'
                WHEN q.question = 'DID SELF HARM INVOLVE SELF POISONING/ OVERDOSE/SWALLOWING OBJECTS' AND res.response = 'YES' THEN 'Poisoning / Overdose / Swallowing'
                WHEN q.question = 'DID SELF HARM METHOD INVOLVE BURNING' AND res.response = 'YES' THEN 'Burning'
                WHEN q.question = 'WAS ANY OTHER SELF HARM METHOD INVOLVED' AND res.response = 'YES' THEN 'Other'
            END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY res.sequence) AS VARCHAR(4000)) AS category,

        CAST(LISTAGG(
            CASE 
                WHEN q.question IN ('TYPE OF IMPLEMENT USED', 'LIGATURE TYPE', 'SELF POISONING/OVERDOSE/SUBSTANCES/SWALLOWING', 'TYPE OF BURNING') 
                THEN res.label -- Using res.label as per your recent snippet
            END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY res.sequence) AS VARCHAR(4000)) AS materials_used,

        CAST(LISTAGG(
            CASE 
                WHEN q.question = 'WHAT OTHER METHOD OF SELF HARM WAS INVOLVED' 
                THEN res.label 
            END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY res.sequence) AS VARCHAR(4000)) AS other_method

    FROM prisons.incidentreporting_question q
    JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_response res ON res.question_id = q.id
    GROUP BY q.report_id
)
SELECT 
    r.id AS report_id,
    r.report_reference,
    r.location,
    al.description              AS location_name,
    al.noms_region_code         AS region_code,
    area.description            AS region_name,
    r.incident_date_and_time,
    r.title,
    r.description,
    pi.prisoner_number,
    -- Redshift natively supports INITCAP
    INITCAP(pi.last_name)       AS last_name,
    INITCAP(pi.first_name)      AS first_name,
    pr.q1_location,
    pr.additional_comment,
    pr.category,
    pr.materials_used,
    pr.other_method
FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report r
JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_AGENCY_LOCATIONS al ON al.agy_loc_id = r.location
LEFT JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_areas area ON area.area_class = 'REGION' AND area.area_code = al.noms_region_code
JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_prisoner_involvement pi 
  ON r.id = pi.report_id 
 AND pi.prisoner_role = 'PERPETRATOR'
LEFT JOIN pivoted_responses pr ON r.id = pr.report_id
WHERE r.type = 'SELF_HARM_1'
  AND r.status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')
